---
title: "argo bias"
subtitle: "project planning"
format:
  html:
    theme: darkly
    toc: true
    toc-title: "contents"
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: right
    number-sections: false
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
  prompt: true
  fig-align: center
  fig-width: 7.5
  fig-height: 4
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    prompt: false
    collapse: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# eda

- calc. radius of drift (by region)
- discuss distance metrics to calc. velocity
